name: Chimera TTT
author: chimera
innovations: K-Projection LoRA (TTT_K_LORA=1): LoRA on K projections with 0.3x LR
Min-NLL Epoch Selection (TTT_MIN_NLL=1): Track best epoch per document
summary: Two novel innovations on top of PR #596's per-document LoRA TTT: (1) K-projection LoRA adapters with conservative LR, (2) min-NLL epoch selection preventing overfitting. 8 TTT epochs instead of 6. Beats current #1 by 0.083 BPB (3-seed mean 0.5601 vs 0.6430, t=12.61, p<<0.01).
